subject: DevOps
title: Secrets in IaC
description: Learn Secrets in IaC in one minute.

hook.text: A database password was hardcoded in a Terraform file. The file was committed to Git. Everyone could read it.

buildup.text: IaC files go in version control. Secrets in those files become permanent. Even deleting the line leaves git history.

discovery.text: Use a secrets manager: Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, or Azure Key Vault. Reference secrets by name, not value.

twist.text: Terraform state also contains secrets in plain text. Encrypt state at rest and restrict access to the state backend.

climax.text: SOPS encrypts specific values in YAML files. Commit encrypted secrets safely. Only authorized users can decrypt.

punchline.text: Never commit plaintext secrets. Reference them from a vault. Encrypt state.

quiz.question: Why is the Terraform state file a security concern?
options: It may contain secrets in plain text
It is publicly accessible by default
